ItacPersonItem.Notes: Jopined the Ricovrati in 1681. Recited an oration in honour of the Saint protector of the Academy (St. Francis de Sales), and one on the occasion of the death of Elena Lucrezia Cornaro Piscopia in 1684. His contribution is also in the related publication.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
